task_completion.description: FreeCAD application is opened and a new document is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD GUI is visible with an active workspace/document.

task_completion.description: A Part Design Body named 'Box' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD Tree View (Combo View) shows a Body explicitly named 'Box'.

task_completion.description: The Box geometry is modeled with an open top and hollow interior.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport shows a rectangular box with an open top. If sketcher or pad parameters are visible, they should indicate 60x40 outer dimensions, 30mm height, and 2mm wall thickness.

task_completion.description: A separate Part Design Body named 'Lid' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD Tree View shows a second, distinct Body explicitly named 'Lid' alongside the 'Box' body.

task_completion.description: The Lid geometry is modeled with a main plate and an alignment lip.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport shows a rectangular plate with a smaller rectangular lip protruding from one face. If dimensions are visible, they should indicate a 60x40x4mm plate and a 56x36x3mm lip.

task_completion.description: The project is saved to the correct file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD window title bar, tree view root node, or a save dialog shows the filename 'project_box_assembly.FCStd' located in '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD GUI to create the models.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with FreeCAD toolbars, sketcher, and dialog boxes rather than just executing terminal commands or Python console scripts.

integrity.description: The models were created using genuine CAD operations.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Tree View shows a valid modeling history for both bodies (e.g., Sketches, Pads, Pockets, or Thickness features) rather than imported static meshes or empty bodies.

integrity.description: The agent worked inside the FreeCAD application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD application window is clearly visible and used for the task, not bypassed by writing a macro in a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/project_box_assembly.FCStd. The document must contain exactly two separate Part Design Bodies named 'Box' and 'Lid'. The Box must have outer dimensions of 60x40x30 mm (target volume: 15,552 mm³). The Lid must consist of a 60x40x4 mm main plate and a 56x36x3 mm alignment lip (target volume: 15,648 mm³). Both volumes have a 10% tolerance.
